raw.subject: Something I noticed about Therapeutic Designs
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you're looking for an aesthetician to rent a quiet room in your studio.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might cost you bookings from potential clients searching online.

I sketched a page idea from your Facebook that could showcase your services, including a photo gallery and contact section, to make it easy for people to find you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/therapeutic-designs-parkersburg

I'd be happy to discuss how a simple online presence could benefit your business. Flat fees apply for local businesses like yours. Give me a quick call to discuss further.
